prose:
**Furan HOMO–LUMO gap (Koopmans-style orbital gap)** — DFT, **B3LYP/def2-TZVP** (tier `standard`, density-fitted RI/RIJK) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz` (9 atoms: 1 O, 4 C, 4 H), used as-is (single-point calculation, not re-optimized at DFT). SCF converged in 9 cycles. **Headline gap: 6.2574 eV** (HOMO = −6.3598 eV, LUMO = −0.1024 eV). This is an orbital-energy gap in the DFT framework, not an excitation energy. Koopmans-style ionization potential (vertical IP) = 6.3598 eV; electron affinity (EA) = 0.1024 eV. All integrity checks passed (trustworthy: true). No warnings reported. Orbital visualizations (`.molden`, `.cube` files) available in the calculation directory.</prose>
<parameter name="n_atoms">9
